patches_modified.name: Free in-app purchases
patches_modified.description: Skips Google Play Billing and credits IAP items (gem packs, coin packs, starter packs) directly. Lets the original failure path run after crediting to close the Contacting screen naturally. Also disables the startup purchase-restore flow.

patches_added.name: Boost search default discovery
patches_added.description: Starts Boost search on an instant cached active-subreddit landing with Reddit-native labels.
